texto: In the popper video, we're going to show you how to fish this scrum popper. I'm going to cast it out there. We're going to show you exactly the proper way to fish this thing. So make sure that no one's behind you, no one's in front of you. You're going to see the foamer out there. I cast this thing to the foamer. When it hits the water...

segmentos.text: In the popper video, we're going to show you how to fish this scrum popper.
I'm going to cast it out there.
We're going to show you exactly the proper way to fish this thing.
So make sure that no one's behind you, no one's in front of you.
You're going to see the foamer out there.
I cast this thing to the foamer.
